item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 130400Z AUTO 25002KT 1000 0450 R20/0600U BCFG NSC 14/14 Q1026 TEMPO BKN008 BECMG 9999 NSW
🟡 TAF LFOT 122300Z 1300/1324 30005KT CAVOK BECMG 1301/1304 VRB03KT PROB30 TEMPO 1304/1305 4000 BR PROB40 TEMPO 1305/1307 BKN008 PROB30 TEMPO 1313/1317 33010KT
